project_rules.title: Library Restriction
project_rules.description: The chatbot is strictly prohibited from using any Python libraries other than numpy, pandas, matplotlib, and seaborn. Do not suggest or use pip install for other packages.

project_rules.title: Absolute Pathing Mandate
project_rules.description: Never use hardcoded relative path strings (e.g., '../data/'). You MUST use 'os.path.abspath(__file__)' to determine the script's directory and build absolute paths to the /data, /knowledge, and /src/assets folders.

project_rules.title: Directory Structure Awareness
project_rules.description: Assume the following structure: 'src/code/main.py' is the script location. Data is in 'src/data/', Knowledge is in 'src/knowledge/', and Assets are in 'src/assets/'. Use 'os.path.join(current_dir, '..', 'folder_name')' to navigate.
